error: [FAIL] ACL stream synchronize failed, error code:507035
summary: Direct random scatter writes with GlobalTensor::SetValue caused a 507035 vector core exception. Fix by copying one input row plus its index/update slices into LocalTensor buffers, applying scatter updates in UB, and writing the completed row back contiguously to GM.

After moving scatter writes into UB, row-tail mismatches remained because the same local row buffer was reused before the previous GM writeback finished. Insert an MTE3->MTE2 synchronization barrier before loading the next row to preserve scatter overwrite order and correctness.
